name: All-Purpose Shaw

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against All-Purpose Shaw's current Spring 2026 brunch, dinner, drinks, and happy-hour PDFs plus the live Shaw Toast catalog.
The corrected catalog contains 57 food and nonalcoholic formulations represented by 82 source presentations across nine canonical categories.
The frozen catalog omitted 22 current formulations, included the stale Roasted Garlic Knots formulation, and represented three formulations twice under service-period or shortened display names.
Current nonalcoholic beer, sparkling wine, mocktails, and soft drinks are retained; alcohol-only brunch drinks, beer, wine, and cocktails are excluded.
All four one-page PDFs were rendered and visually reviewed to confirm column order, section boundaries, ingredient descriptions, and alcohol/nonalcoholic classification.

The restaurant publishes fixed ingredient descriptions, a whole-wheat pizza-dough disclosure, GF substitution context, and an instruction to tell the server about allergies, but no complete recipe-level allergen matrix or cross-contact policy.
Thirty-nine current formulations have evidence-backed fixed contains signals; 18 remain unavailable for fixed allergen data.

Three frozen rows overreported allergens: Arancini 'Donatello' asserted wheat/gluten without published support, Breakfast Sandwich asserted fish despite no fish ingredient, and Italian Hash Browns promoted optional smoked salmon into a fixed fish claim.

The current FAQ says most pizzas can use gluten-free dough and that staff will try to accommodate dietary restrictions. Those substitution and accommodation statements are not negative safety or cross-contact claims.
Optional pizza toppings, selectable brunch proteins, and Toast allergy-request controls are not promoted into fixed allergens; absent information remains unavailable.
The frozen generic website extraction mixed older service-period pages and did not reconcile the restaurant's current PDF set with its linked ordering catalog.

That partial view omitted current dine-in dishes, online-only items, nonalcoholic drinks, and soft drinks while retaining one stale item and duplicate formulations such as AP Caesar/Brunch Caesar and Standard/Standard Pizza.

The correction preserves each current PDF presentation, adds only live Toast rows absent from the PDFs, consolidates verified aliases, and applies allergen semantics after separating optional choices.
A guarded repair requires exact item, category, source-type, unavailable-count, stale-item, and critical allergen invariants before replacing the frozen entry.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured, text-extracted, rendered, and visually reviewed the four current first-party PDFs linked from the Shaw location page: Brunch, Dinner, Drinks, and Happy Hour.
notes: The Brunch, Dinner, and Drinks PDFs are Spring 2026 files published under the site's 2026/04 path; the current Happy Hour PDF is under 2026/02.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Reviewed the live restaurant-linked Shaw Toast menu at 1250 9th Street NW, including current dinner, online-only food rows, nonalcoholic drinks, and soft drinks; direct ledger capture was blocked by HTTP 403.
notes: Current live menu content was independently visible through the indexed Toast surface and reconciled only where it identified the Shaw location and a currently listed row.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current Shaw location/FAQ page and reviewed its dietary-accommodation and gluten-free-dough statements; no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure was found.
notes: Artifact SHA-256: 47b8f1134a1ea5987e3e17033f9b5fad6d3b40d10e447bfc6ae025a7bf38ae79.

findings.summary: The frozen 39-row catalog omitted 22 current Shaw formulations, retained one stale item, and duplicated three current formulations under service-period or shortened names.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 57 current formulations from 82 source presentations, removed Roasted Garlic Knots, consolidated three duplicate frozen formulations, and restored every current PDF or live-Toast food/nonalcoholic row.

findings.summary: Three frozen rows asserted fish or wheat/gluten that the current fixed ingredients do not support.
findings.resolution: Removed unsupported wheat/gluten from Arancini 'Donatello', unsupported fish from The Breakfast Sandwich, and optional smoked-salmon fish from Italian Hash Browns while retaining its fixed milk signal.

findings.summary: The generic extraction did not reconcile current PDF service periods with the live linked ordering catalog, causing omissions, duplicates, and a stale formulation.
findings.resolution: Prepared a captured-source catalog with explicit alcohol exclusion, exact source presentations, alias consolidation, optional-choice separation, and guarded output invariants.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 57-formulation, 82-presentation current Shaw catalog with 39 fixed-positive rows, 18 unavailable rows, and all 39 frozen rows terminally reconciled.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/all-purpose-audit/repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 57 items, nine categories, 39 fixed-positive rows, 18 unavailable rows, stale-item removal, optional-fish corrections, and identical SHA-256 after a second run)
